meta.description: Hand-curated labeled conversation transcripts for AntiScam AI benchmarking. Human-authored for trustworthy labels and full reproducibility with no API key. Illustrative, not real call data.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Am I speaking with Rajesh Kumar? This is Inspector Vikram Rathore from CBI Mumbai, badge 4471.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes. What is this about?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: A parcel in your name to Taiwan was seized. It contained 400 grams of MDMA and fake passports. FIR MUM/CBI/2024/8871 is registered against you under the NDPS Act.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: I never sent any parcel!

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Your Aadhaar was used, this is money laundering. You are under digital arrest. Do not disconnect this video call and do not inform your family.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: To prove your funds are clean, transfer your balance to RBI verification account 50100294471882. It refunds in two hours, or a non-bailable warrant issues tonight.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: This is the Telecom Regulatory Authority. Your number will be deactivated in two hours for illegal activity.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Why? I paid my bill.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Nine complaints of illegal advertising are registered against your SIM in Andheri. I am transferring you to the cyber crime department now.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Officer speaking. A money laundering case is open against your Aadhaar. Do not tell anyone. Stay on this call.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: You must move your savings to a government safe account for verification, account number 39100288812major, immediately.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Calling from your bank. Your KYC has expired and the account will be blocked within two hours.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Oh no, what do I do?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Just a quick verification. I am sending an OTP now — please read it out to complete the update.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: It says 4412...

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good. Now install AnyDesk from the Play Store so I can complete the re-KYC on your screen.

records.label: scam
records.title: KBC lucky draw / GST advance fee

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Congratulations! Your number won 25 lakh in the KBC Lucky Draw!

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: But I never entered any draw.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: It is automatic for all subscribers. Just pay the 5% GST clearance of Rs 12,500 to release the prize.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Send it via UPI to kbcclaim2024@ybl and the full amount credits in 24 hours.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Sir, you are pre-approved for a 5 lakh instant loan at 2% interest, no documents needed.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: That sounds very low. What is the catch?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: No catch. Only a refundable processing fee of Rs 3,500 is required before disbursal. Pay to account 771100294455 and the loan is credited today.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Why do I pay before getting the loan?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: It is a security formality, fully refundable with your first EMI. Pay now to lock this offer.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: We saw your resume. A work-from-home data job pays Rs 3,000 daily, just two hours of tasks.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: That sounds good. How do I start?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: A one-time registration and training-kit fee of Rs 1,999 is required. Pay to raj.hr@paytm and we activate your account.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Slots are filling fast, please pay within the hour to confirm your seat.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Join our VIP trading group. Our members double their money every month, guaranteed returns.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Guaranteed? Really?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes, our AI algorithm never loses. Deposit Rs 50,000 to start on our platform, link is invest-profit-pro.co.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: This offer closes tonight. Transfer to UPI winbig.trade@okhdfcbank now to secure your slot.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: This is Microsoft support. Your computer is sending virus signals and your bank account is at risk.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Oh! What should I do?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Install AnyDesk immediately so I can remove the virus and secure your net banking. Do not turn off the screen.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Now open your banking app so I can verify no money was stolen. Read me the OTP if one arrives.

records.label: legitimate
records.title: Genuine bank fraud desk — confirm transaction

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi, this is Priya from HDFC Bank's fraud monitoring team. Am I speaking with Mr. Anand?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, speaking.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: We flagged a Rs 45,000 transaction on your card ending 4412 in Hyderabad ten minutes ago. Can you confirm if this was you?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: No, I am in Pune. That was not me.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: I am blocking the card now. I will never ask for your OTP, PIN, or password, and no bank employee ever will.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Your dispute reference is DSP-88214. To verify this call, please hang up and dial the number on the back of your card.

records.label: legitimate
records.title: Genuine courier — delivery OTP for real parcel

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, this is Ravi from Delhivery. I am at your gate with an Amazon parcel.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, I was expecting it. Coming down.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Could you share the delivery OTP that came to your phone so I can mark it delivered?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Sure, it is 7721.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Thank you, delivered. Have a good day!

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Good afternoon, this is Sneha from Bajaj Finance about your personal loan EMI.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, I know it is a few days late.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Your EMI of Rs 8,400 was due on the 5th. A late fee applies and it may affect your credit score.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: You can pay through the Bajaj Finserv app or net banking. Would you like the payment link by SMS?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes please, I will pay today.

records.label: legitimate
records.title: Genuine recruiter — interview scheduling, no fee

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hi Meera, this is Karan from TCS talent acquisition, about the software role you applied for.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Yes, hello.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: We would like to schedule a technical interview. Are you available Thursday at 3pm?

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Thursday works. Is there any fee for the process?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: No, absolutely not — we never charge candidates. You will get a calendar invite from our official domain shortly.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Hi, I called because my broadband has been down since morning.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Sorry about that. I can see an outage in your area, engineers are on it. It should be back within four hours.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Okay, will I get a refund for the downtime?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes, a pro-rated credit will apply automatically to your next bill. Your ticket number is BB-55210.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Hey, are we still on for dinner on Saturday?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Yes! I booked a table at that new place near the lake for 8pm.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Perfect. Should I pick you up?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Sure, around 7:30 works. I will transfer you my share for the last time too.

records.label: legitimate
records.title: Genuine branch callback about a form

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, this is Amit from your ICICI home branch. Your cheque book request is ready for pickup.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Oh good. Do I need to bring anything?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Just your ID. We do not need any OTP or online details — please collect it at the branch counter.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Great, I will come tomorrow.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, this is a reminder from LIC that your policy premium is due next week.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Thanks. How can I pay?

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Through the official LIC website, the app, or any branch. Your policy number is on your bond document.

turns.speaker: user
turns.text: Alright, I will pay online.
